projectInfo.name: Materials Selection App
projectInfo.description: Web application for managing materials selection with AWS backend (Lambda, DynamoDB, API Gateway)
architecture: Static hosting on S3 with CloudFront

codeStyle: Functional components and hooks for React
Explicit error handling - no silent failures
Modern JavaScript features (async/await, destructuring, optional chaining)
Clear comments explaining 'why' not 'what' for non-obvious code
patterns: Serverless patterns (Lambda, DynamoDB) for cost efficiency

architectureDecisions.decision: Use DynamoDB for all data storage
architectureDecisions.reasoning: Cost-effective serverless database, fits well with Lambda architecture, no server management

architectureDecisions.decision: Deploy static site to S3 + CloudFront
architectureDecisions.reasoning: Low cost, high performance, simple deployment pipeline

commonIssues.issue: CORS errors when calling API Gateway from localhost
commonIssues.solution: Ensure CORS is properly configured on API Gateway with OPTIONS method and correct headers. Use cors-params.json template.

developmentNotes.note: JSON-based knowledge system set up for cross-session persistence with PowerShell helper scripts. Can be upgraded to full MCP when SDK becomes available.
Product import tool created for bulk importing products from CSV with automatic vendor association creation. Supports dry-run validation, URL checking, and S3 image upload.

Bedrock Knowledge Base and OpenSearch Serverless collection deleted to save $5.77/day (~$173/month). Full configuration documented in docs/BEDROCK_OPENSEARCH_CONFIGURATION.md for easy recreation when AI features are ready for testing. IAM role preserved for reuse.

tools.name: Product Import Tool
tools.purpose: Bulk import products from CSV into DynamoDB
features: CSV template with all product fields
Automatic vendor association creation (primaryVendor, vendorSku, vendorCost)
Optional S3 image upload and hosting

dataModel.obsoleteTablesNote: Underscore format tables are obsolete and can be safely deleted
